name: rust-github-actions
description: Rust-specific CI patterns: clippy, cargo-nextest, cargo-deny, sanitizers, coverage, and release automation

decisions.decision: Separate CI jobs for formatting, linting, testing, and security scanning with dtolnay/rust-toolchain
decisions.rationale: Separate jobs provide fast feedback on the specific failure type. dtolnay/rust-toolchain is the maintained replacement for the deprecated actions-rs toolchain. Parallel jobs reduce total CI time.
decisions.details: Jobs: fmt (cargo fmt --all -- --check), clippy (--workspace --all-targets --all-features, RUSTFLAGS="-Dwarnings"), test (cargo nextest run --workspace), deny (cargo deny check), coverage (cargo llvm-cov, main only). Actions: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable (@nightly, @1.XX for MSRV). Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 after toolchain setup.

decisions.decision: Test on stable + MSRV; optionally nightly with continue-on-error; cross-platform matrix for binaries
decisions.rationale: Stable catches current issues. MSRV ensures downstream compatibility. Nightly previews upcoming breakage but should not block PRs. Cross-platform testing catches platform-specific bugs.
decisions.details: Matrix: rust: [stable, "1.XX" (MSRV)], os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]. Nightly: continue-on-error: true. Set fail-fast: false. Cross-compile: houseabsolute/actions-rust-cross. Feature combos: cargo hack test --feature-powerset --depth 2.

decisions.decision: Use Swatinem/rust-cache for Cargo and target directory caching
decisions.rationale: Swatinem/rust-cache automatically caches ~/.cargo and target/ directories, keyed on Cargo.lock, toolchain, and job. It sets CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 for reproducible CI builds. Saves 2-5 minutes per job.
decisions.details: Place after toolchain, before build. Options: shared-key (cross-job sharing), cache-on-failure: true, save-if (conditional). Auto-detects multiple Cargo.lock files. 10 GiB repo cache limit.

decisions.decision: Run cargo-deny in CI on every PR; cargo audit on weekly schedule
decisions.rationale: cargo-deny checks advisories, licenses, bans, and sources in one pass. Running on every PR catches issues at introduction time. Weekly cargo audit catches newly disclosed vulnerabilities in existing dependencies.
decisions.details: EmbarkStudios/cargo-deny-action@v2, matrix on checks: [advisories, bans, licenses, sources], command: check ${{ matrix.checks }}. Requires deny.toml -- start permissive, tighten over time. Weekly cron: cargo audit as safety net.

decisions.decision: Run sanitizers in CI: ASan+UBSan together, TSan separately, optionally MSan
decisions.rationale: Sanitizers catch memory safety and concurrency bugs that tests alone miss. ASan and TSan are mutually exclusive and must run as separate jobs. MSan is Clang-only and requires all dependencies instrumented.
decisions.details: Job 1: RUSTFLAGS="-Zsanitizer=address" cargo +nightly nextest run. Job 2: RUSTFLAGS="-Zsanitizer=thread" cargo +nightly nextest run. Use -Zbuild-std for instrumented stdlib. Set ASAN_OPTIONS=detect_leaks=1, UBSAN_OPTIONS=print_stacktrace=1. Add Miri job: cargo +nightly miri test.

decisions.decision: Use cargo-llvm-cov for code coverage; upload to Codecov
decisions.rationale: cargo-llvm-cov uses LLVM source-based instrumentation for accurate, region-level coverage. It is cross-platform (Linux/macOS/Windows), unlike cargo-tarpaulin which is Linux-only and ptrace-based.
decisions.details: Run: cargo llvm-cov --workspace --lcov --output-path lcov.info. Upload: codecov/codecov-action@v4, file: lcov.info. Target 80%+. Run on main merges for trends; optionally on PRs for diff coverage.

decisions.decision: Use release-plz for version bumping and changelog; cargo-dist for binary packaging and GitHub Releases
decisions.rationale: release-plz automates version bumping from Conventional Commits, changelog generation via git-cliff, and crates.io publishing. cargo-dist handles cross-platform binary builds, installers, and GitHub Release uploads. They complement each other.
decisions.details: release-plz: push-to-main triggers release PR (version bump + changelog). Merge publishes to crates.io. cargo-dist: tag push triggers cross-platform binary builds + GitHub Release with installers (shell, PowerShell, Homebrew). Simpler alt: cargo-release for versioning + publishing in one tool.
